prompt: Out-of-focus Tokyo cityscape at night seen through rain-spotted glass — neon signs reduced to soft pink, violet, and blue bokeh orbs floating across the frame. No readable text — just abstract neon color blobs. A few sharper raindrops on the glass in the foreground. The overall feeling is dreamy urban isolation. Soft, melancholic, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
